titles.text: Dragon Ball Z II: Gekishin Frieza!!
ドラゴンボールＺⅡ 激神フリーザ！！

descriptions.text: Dragon Ball Z II: Gekishin Frieza!! is a role playing video game released only in Japan by Bandai on August 10, 1991, for the Nintendo Famicom. Gekishin Freeza!! is also one of the games downloadable in the game compilation J Legend Retsuden for Nintendo 3DS.
